sourceQuery.rawQuery:
Select  
*,
((t2.SchUT - (t2.UnplannedDT+PlannedDT))) / t2.SchUT * 100 as ActualAvailability,
(t2.SchUT - PlannedDT) / t2.SchUT * 100 as TargetUvailability
from (
select 
t1.service as Service,
t1.Supplier as Supplier,
t1.Impact as BusinessCritical,
sum(t1.Unplanned) UnplannedDT,
sum(t1.Planned) PlannedDT,
t1.UT_Hrs as SchUT
from (
SELECT DISTINCT
`AST:BUSINESSSERVICE 1`.`Name` AS service,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Support Organization` as Supplier,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date` AS C2,
SubStr(datename('mm',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date`),0,2) AS C3,
`AST:BUSINESSSERVICE 1`.`Impact` AS Impact,
DATEDIFF('ss', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date`, `HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`) * 1.00 / 3600 as Unplanned,
0.00 as Planned,
CASE 
WHEN SubStr(datename('mm',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date`),0,2) = 'Jan'
 OR SubStr(datename('mm',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date`),0,2) = 'Mar'
 OR SubStr(datename('mm',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date`),0,2) = 'May'
 OR SubStr(datename('mm',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date`),0,2) = 'Jul'
 OR SubStr(datename('mm',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date`),0,2) = 'Aug'
 OR SubStr(datename('mm',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date`),0,2) = 'Oct'
 OR SubStr(datename('mm',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date`),0,2) = 'Dec' THEN 31 * 24
 WHEN SubStr(datename('mm',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date`),0,2) = 'Feb' THEN 28 * 24
 WHEN SubStr(datename('mm',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date`),0,2) = 'Apr'
 OR SubStr(datename('mm',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date`),0,2) = 'Jun'
 OR SubStr(datename('mm',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date`),0,2) = 'Sep'
 OR SubStr(datename('mm',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date`),0,2) = 'Nov' THEN 30 * 24
END as UT_Hrs
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Associations`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
ON (`HPD:Associations`.`Request ID02` = `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:BusinessService` AS `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE 1`
ON (`HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` = `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE 1`.`Name`)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join` AS `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`
ON (`HPD:Associations`.`Request ID01` = `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`CI Unavailability ID`)
WHERE (
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` IN ('Closed')
AND `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` IN ('High', 'Critical')
AND `HPD:Help Desk`.`Resolution Category` IN ('Failure')
AND `HPD:Help Desk`.`Service Type` IN ('User Service Restoration')
AND (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Association Type` NOT IN ('Duplicate') OR `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Association Type` IS NULL)
AND `HPD:Associations`.`Request Type01` IN ('CI Unavailability')
AND `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Data Set Id` IN ('BMC.ASSET')
AND `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Unavailability Class` IN ('Incident')
AND `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Unavailability Type` IN ('Unscheduled Full')
AND `HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date` <= $__to/1000
AND `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE 1`.`Name` in ($service)
)
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT
   `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE`.`Name` AS C5,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ASORG` AS C6,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Scheduled End Date` AS C7,
   SubStr(datename('mm',`AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled End Date`),0,2) AS C8,
   `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE`.`Impact` AS C9,
   0.00 as Unplanned,
   DATEDIFF('ss', `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled Start Date`, `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled End Date`) * 1.00 / 3600 as Planned,
   CASE
      WHEN SubStr(datename('mm',`AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled End Date`),0,2) = 'Jan'
      OR SubStr(datename('mm',`AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled End Date`),0,2) = 'Mar'
      OR SubStr(datename('mm',`AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled End Date`),0,2) = 'May'
      OR SubStr(datename('mm',`AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled End Date`),0,2) = 'Jul'
      OR SubStr(datename('mm',`AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled End Date`),0,2) = 'Aug'
      OR SubStr(datename('mm',`AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled End Date`),0,2) = 'Oct'
      OR SubStr(datename('mm',`AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled End Date`),0,2) = 'Dec' THEN 31 * 24
      WHEN SubStr(datename('mm',`AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled End Date`),0,2) = 'Feb' THEN 28 * 24
      WHEN SubStr(datename('mm',`AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled End Date`),0,2) = 'Apr'
      OR SubStr(datename('mm',`AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled End Date`),0,2) = 'Jun'
      OR SubStr(datename('mm',`AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled End Date`),0,2) = 'Sep'
      OR SubStr(datename('mm',`AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled End Date`),0,2) = 'Nov' THEN 30 * 24
   END as UT_Hrs
FROM `AR System Schema`.`CHG:Infrastructure Change`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:BusinessService` AS `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE`
ON (
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ServiceCI` = `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE`.`Name`
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`CHG:Associations`
ON (
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID` = `CHG:Associations`.`Request ID02`
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join` AS `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`
ON (
   `CHG:Associations`.`Request ID01` = `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`CI Unavailability ID`
)
WHERE (
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`CurrentStageNumber` IN (4, 5)
   AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status` IN ('Closed', 'Completed', 'Implementation In Progress', 'Pending', 'Rejected')
   AND (
      `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Timing` IN ('Expedited', 'Latent', 'No Impact', 'Normal', 'Standard')
      OR (
         `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Timing` IN ('Emergency')
         AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Reason For Change` NOT IN ('Incident Resolution')
      )
   )
   AND `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`ClassId` IN ('BMC_APPLICATION','BMC_BusinessService')
   AND `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Data Set Id` IN ('BMC.ASSET')
   AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Scheduled End Date` >= $__from/1000 and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Scheduled End Date` <= $__to/1000
   AND `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE`.`Name` in ($service)
)) as t1
group by t1.service,t1.Supplier,t1.Impact,t1.UT_Hrs
) as t2

SELECT Distinct
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` AS C1,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` AS C2,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Description` AS C3,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` AS C4,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status_Reason` AS C5,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Service Type` AS C6,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Association Type` AS C7,
   `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE 1`.`Name` AS C8,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Support Organization` C9,
    DATEDIFF('ss', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date`, `HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`) * 1.00 / 3600,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` AS C11,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Categorization Tier 1` AS C12,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Categorization Tier 2` AS C13,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Categorization Tier 3` AS C14,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Product Categorization Tier 1` AS C15,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Product Categorization Tier 2` AS C16,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Product Categorization Tier 3` AS C17,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Product Name` AS C18,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Resolution Category` AS C19,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Resolution Category Tier 2` AS C20,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Resolution Category Tier 3` AS C21,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Closure Product Category Tier1` AS C22,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Closure Product Category Tier2` AS C23,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Closure Product Category Tier3` AS C24,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Closure Product Name` AS C25,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` AS C26,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`HPD_CI` AS C27,
   CASE
      WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Closure Product Name` IS NULL THEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Product Name`
      ELSE `HPD:Help Desk`.`Closure Product Name`
   END,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date` AS C28,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` AS C29,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date` AS C30,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date` AS C31,
   DATEDIFF('ss', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date`, `HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`) / 60,
   SubStr(datename('mm',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date`),0,2) AS C32,
   YEAR(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date`) AS C33,
   `HPD:Associations`.`Request Type01` AS C34,
   `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Unavailability Type` AS C35,
   `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Name` AS C36,
   `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Unavailability Class` AS C37,
   `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Actual Start Date` AS C38,
   `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Actual End Date` AS C39,
   (DATEDIFF('ss', `HPD:Help Desk`.`Reported Date`, `HPD:Help Desk`.`Last Resolved Date`) * 1.00 / 3600) / 24,
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`InstanceId`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Associations`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
ON (
   `HPD:Associations`.`Request ID02` = `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:BusinessService` AS `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE 1`
ON (
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`ServiceCI` = `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE 1`.`Name`
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join` AS `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`
ON (
   `HPD:Associations`.`Request ID01` = `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`CI Unavailability ID`
)
WHERE (
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` IN ('Closed')
   AND `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` IN ('High', 'Critical')
   AND `HPD:Help Desk`.`Resolution Category` IN ('Failure')
   AND `HPD:Help Desk`.`Service Type` IN ('User Service Restoration')
   AND (
      `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Association Type` NOT IN ('Duplicate')
      OR `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Association Type` IS NULL
   )
   AND `HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Closed Date` <= $__to/1000
   AND `HPD:Associations`.`Request Type01` IN ('CI Unavailability')
   AND `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Data Set Id` IN ('BMC.ASSET')
   AND `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Unavailability Class` IN ('Incident')
   AND `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Unavailability Type` IN ('Unscheduled Full')
   AND `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE 1`.`Name` in ($service)
)

panels.title: Details of Incidents that impacted application availability

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID` AS C1,
   CASE
      WHEN `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`CurrentStageNumber` = 1 THEN 'Initiate'
      WHEN `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`CurrentStageNumber` = 2 THEN 'Review & Authorize'
      WHEN `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`CurrentStageNumber` = 3 THEN 'Plan & Schedule'
      WHEN `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`CurrentStageNumber` = 4 THEN 'Implement'
      WHEN `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`CurrentStageNumber` = 5 THEN 'Closed'
   END,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status` AS C2,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Status Reason` AS C3,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Risk Level` AS C4,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Completed Date` as ClosedDate,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Timing` AS C5,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Reason For Change` AS C6,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Timing_Reason` AS C7,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Environment` AS C8,
   `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE`.`Name` AS C9,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ASORG` AS C10,
   DATEDIFF('ss', `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled Start Date`, `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled End Date`) * 1.00 / 3600,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submitter` AS C12,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submit Date` AS C13,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Last Modified By` AS C14,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Last Modified Date` AS C15,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Region` AS C16,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Categorization Tier 1` AS C17,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Categorization Tier 2` AS C18,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Categorization Tier 3` AS C19,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Product Cat Tier 1` AS C20,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Product Cat Tier 2` AS C21,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Product Cat Tier 3` AS C22,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Product Name (2)` AS C23,
   `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Name` AS C24,
   CASE
      WHEN `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Description` IS NULL THEN 'Not Available'
      ELSE `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Description`
   END,
   `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled Start Date` AS C25,
   `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled End Date` AS C26,
   `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Actual Start Date` AS C27,
   `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Actual End Date` AS C28,
   `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Category` AS C29,
   `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Type` AS C30,
   `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Item` AS C31,
   DATEDIFF('ss', `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled Start Date`, `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled End Date`) / 60,
   YEAR(`AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled End Date`) AS C32,
   SubStr(datename('mm',`AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled End Date`),0,2) AS C33,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`InstanceId`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`CHG:Infrastructure Change`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:BusinessService` AS `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE`
ON (
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ServiceCI` = `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE`.`Name`
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`CHG:Associations`
ON (
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID` = `CHG:Associations`.`Request ID02`
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:CI Unavailability CI Join` AS `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`
ON (
   `CHG:Associations`.`Request ID01` = `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`CI Unavailability ID`
)
WHERE (
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID` IS NOT NULL
)
AND (
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`CurrentStageNumber` IN (4, 5)
   AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status` IN ('Closed', 'Completed', 'Implementation In Progress', 'Rejected')
   AND (
      `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Timing` IN ('Expedited', 'Latent', 'No Impact', 'Standard', 'Normal')
      OR (
         `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Timing` IN ('Emergency')
         AND `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Reason For Change` NOT IN ('Incident Resolution')
      )
   )
   AND `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled End Date` >= $__from/1000 and `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Scheduled End Date` <= $__to/1000
   AND `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`ClassId` IN ('BMC_APPLICATION','BMC_BusinessService')
   AND `AST:CI UNAVAILABILITY CI JOIN`.`Data Set Id` IN ('BMC.ASSET')
   AND `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE`.`Name` in ($service)
)

panels.title: Details of changes that impacted application availability

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
   `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE`.`Name` AS C1,
   `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE`.`Supplier Name+` AS C2,
   `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE`.`Impact` AS C4
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BusinessService` AS `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE`
WHERE (
   `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE`.`Data Set Id` IN ('BMC.ASSET')
   AND `AST:BUSINESSSERVICE`.`Name` in ($service)
 
)
